---
name: "bug"
description: "Generate a structured bug report file for a known or suspected issue."
argument-hint: "bugTitle=<title> bugDescription=<description> affectedArea=<area>"
agent: "agent"
---

Use @.ai/commands/bug.md as the canonical command definition.
Follow it exactly.
Treat the text supplied by the user when invoking this prompt as the command input.
